methods.name: FixedPointMathLib.log2
FixedPointMathLib.log10
methods.desc:
@dev Returns the log10 of `x`.
 Returns 0 if `x` is zero.

methods.name: FixedPointMathLib.divWadUp
methods.desc: @dev Equivalent to `(x * WAD) / y` rounded up.

methods.name: FixedPointMathLib.dist
methods.desc: @dev Returns the absolute distance between `x` and `y`.

methods.name: FixedPointMathLib.mulWadUp
methods.desc: @dev Equivalent to `(x * y) / WAD` rounded up.

methods.name: FixedPointMathLib.mulWad
methods.desc: @dev Equivalent to `(x * y) / WAD` rounded down.

methods.name: FixedPointMathLib.rawSub
methods.desc: @dev Returns `x - y`, without checking for underflow.
